name: T. S. Eliot
abstract: Thomas Stearns Eliot (26 September 1888 – 4 January 1965) was a poet, essayist and playwright. He was a leading figure of modernist poetry in the English language where he altered the art through his use of pessimistic language, writing style, and verse structure.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: like T. S. Eliot, it started with a bang and ended with a whimper.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
